summary: Excellent masterful show with textbook new-song renditions and a very nice recording
review: The performance is praised as masterful, delivering near‑textbook versions of the newer material – especially highlighted by an enthusiastic “What a Stella!” comment. The recording itself is described as "very nice," though no technical details are given.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes a superb show and a pleasant recording, leading to a high rating despite the lack of detailed technical information.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the recording "very nice" but offers no specifics about clarity, mix balance, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure; reviewers focus solely on overall performance quality.
